EXCPETED_EXCEPTION_FROM_SUMMARY: org.apache.spark.SparkException(1): Multiple failures in stage materialization. | org.apache.spark.SparkException(1): Not enough memory to build and broadcast the table to all worker nodes. As a workaround, you can either disable broadcast by setting spark.sql.autoBroadcastJoinThreshold to -1 or increase the spark driver memory by setting spark.driver.memory to a higher value.
